rationale: Educ. Code §30.052 governs the Texas School for the Deaf's board composition, terms, budget, and operations. It contains no provisions related to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 30.052. GOVERNANCE OF THE TEXAS SCHOOL FOR THE DEAF.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns governance of a state agency school and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
